Home / Service Areas / Riverton

General-contractor in Riverton, UT

Trusted local professionals serving Riverton and surrounding communities

Serving Riverton, UT

Riverton, UT, is a suburban city with a population of around 45,000, featuring a mix of established neighborhoods and new developments. Legacy General Contractor provides comprehensive construction services, from basement finishes to full custom homes, tailored to Riverton's growing demand. The cold, snowy winters and inversions make proper insulation and weatherproofing essential, and our team ensures homes are built to withstand Utah's harsh climate.

Riverton offers a quiet, family-friendly atmosphere with easy access to the Salt Lake Valley.

General-contractor Services in Riverton

Home Additions

Expand your living space while preserving your home's character.

Learn more →

Kitchen Remodels

Functional, beautiful kitchens designed for Utah lifestyles.

Learn more →

Bathroom Renovations

Water-wise updates that handle Utah's hard water.

Learn more →

Foundation Repair

Solutions for Utah's problematic soils and seismic activity.

Learn more →

Roof Replacement

Durable roofs built for Utah's snow loads and sun exposure.

Learn more →
